creator: steffen@fritz.wtf
text:
Thanks for the every fast update!

As I just realized there is already version 6.2.17 with a lot of bug fixes and improvements, https://community.ui.com/releases/UniFi-Network-Controller-6-2-17/7f6d58bc-ce9f-43f2-8bc8-0c0dd935ebce

UI seems to have a poor QA these days and pushes bad controller software, but often.

I don't know how to handle this "DevOps" banana software release circle but it would be great to have 6.2.17.

BR,

Steffen
